calculator.name: Heat Resilience Champions Impact Calculator
calculator.description: Models programme outcomes based on adjustable input parameters

cool_roof_m2_per_champion.label: Cool Roof m² Installed per Champion
cool_roof_m2_per_champion.source: NRDC Cool Roofs Toolkit 2023 — average community deployment
cool_roof_m2_per_champion.benchmark: Ahmedabad programme average: 45 m² per trained volunteer

co2_per_m2.label: CO₂ Saved per m² of Cool Roof per Year
co2_per_m2.source: Berkeley Lab / Akbari et al. 2012 — depends on climate zone and cooling energy mix
co2_per_m2.benchmark: Range: 1.2 kg (mild climate) to 4.8 kg (hot + coal-heavy grid)

people_reached_per_champion.label: People Reached per Champion
people_reached_per_champion.source: NRDC community health worker model — Ahmedabad HAP
people_reached_per_champion.benchmark: Ahmedabad CHWs reach 50–80 households each during heat season

cost_per_champion.label: Cost per Champion (Training + Materials)
cost_per_champion.source: Globe From Home programme design estimates
cost_per_champion.benchmark: Ahmedabad HAP: ~$0.50/person; includes training materials, basic cool roof kit, awareness collateral

deployment_rate.label: Deployment Rate (% of Trained Champions Active)
deployment_rate.source: Community health programme retention benchmarks — WHO CHW Guidelines 2018
deployment_rate.benchmark: Typical NGO volunteer retention 60–75% after 12 months

cool_roof_energy_savings.source: NRDC Cool Roofs Toolkit / Berkeley Lab
